title: wedelia prostrata
intro: Wedelia prostrata, also known as creeping wedelia or spreading wedelia, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Wedelia prostrata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Wedelia prostrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
